landing.title: Find Your Perfect
landing.subtitle: Discover the ideal course or specialization for your unique profile. Our intelligent system analyzes your interests, skills, and goals to provide personalized recommendations.

features.title: Why Choose Our System?
features.subtitle: Built with transparency and accuracy in mind, our expert system provides recommendations you can trust and understand.

smartAnalysis.title: Smart Analysis
smartAnalysis.description: Our expert system analyzes your interests, skills, and goals using 70+ weighted rules.

personalized.title: Personalized Recommendations

explainable.title: Explainable AI

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to discover your ideal academic path

step1.title: Answer Questions
step1.description: Complete a quick 15-question survey about your interests, skills, and career goals.

step2.title: AI Analysis
step2.description: Our expert system evaluates your answers using a comprehensive knowledge base.

step3.title: Get Results
step3.description: Receive your personalized top 3 recommendations with detailed explanations.

questionnaire.title: Career Path Assessment
questionnaire.subtitle: Answer the following questions to help us understand your interests, skills, and goals. This will help us recommend the best specializations for you.
questionnaire.error: Please answer all questions before continuing.

interests.title: Your Interests
interests.description: Tell us what topics and activities excite you the most

primary-interest.text: Which of these areas interests you the most?

building-software.label: Building software and applications
building-software.description: Creating programs that solve real problems

designing-interfaces.label: Designing beautiful interfaces
designing-interfaces.description: Creating visually appealing and usable designs

secondary-interests.text: Select ALL other areas that also interest you:

learning-preference.text: How do you prefer to learn new things?

structured-courses.label: Structured courses and tutorials
structured-courses.description: Following a curriculum step by step

skills.title: Your Skills
skills.description: Rate your current abilities in various areas

programming-level.text: How would you rate your programming skills?

math-level.text: How comfortable are you with mathematics and statistics?

design-level.text: How would you rate your visual/design skills?

communication-level.text: How strong are your communication and presentation skills?

existing-skills.text: Which of these skills do you already have some experience with?

personality.title: Your Personality
personality.description: Help us understand your work style and preferences

work-style.text: How do you prefer to work?

solo.label: Independently, focused on my own tasks
solo.description: I do my best work alone

small-team.label: In a small, close-knit team
small-team.description: Collaborating with a few trusted colleagues

mixed.label: A mix of solo and team work

problem-approach.text: When facing a complex problem, you typically:

analytical.label: Break it down into logical steps

research.label: Research how others have solved it

detail-oriented.label: Detail-oriented perfectionist
detail-oriented.description: I focus on getting every detail right

big-picture.label: Big-picture visionary
big-picture.description: I focus on the overall strategy and vision

balanced.label: Balanced - depends on the situation
balanced.description: I can switch between both modes

risk-tolerance.text: How do you feel about taking risks and trying new things?

career.title: Career Goals
career.description: Share your professional aspirations and preferences

work-environment.text: What type of work environment appeals to you most?

startup.label: Fast-paced startup
startup.description: High risk, high reward, wearing many hats

career-priority.text: What is most important to you in a career?

options.impact: Making a positive impact on society

five-year-vision.text: Where do you see yourself in 5 years?

technical-expert.label: Deep technical expert in my field

entrepreneur.label: Running my own business or startup

industry-preference.text: Which industries interest you the most? (Select all that apply)

results.title: Top Recommended Specializations
results.subtitle: Based on your interests, skills, personality, and career goals, here are the specializations that best match your profile.
results.analysisNote: Our expert system analyzed your responses using {count} weighted rules to generate these recommendations. Click on each card to see detailed explanations.
results.notSatisfied: Not satisfied with the results? You can retake the assessment or explore more options.
results.disclaimer: This recommendation is based on a rule-based expert system analysis. Your final decision should also consider other factors like personal circumstances, market trends, and professional advice.

error.title: Oops!
error.noResults: No results found. Please complete the questionnaire first.

considerations.title: Considerations
considerations.noCareer: This specialization may not fully align with your stated career goals.
considerations.noSkills: You may need to further develop key skills required for this field.
considerations.fewMatches: This recommendation is based on a limited number of matching factors. Additional research is advised.

computer-science.name: Computer Science
computer-science.description: Study of computation, algorithms, and programming. Focuses on theoretical foundations and practical software development.

data-science.name: Data Science & Analytics
data-science.description: Extracting insights from data using statistics, machine learning, and visualization. Combines math, programming, and domain expertise.

cybersecurity.name: Cybersecurity
cybersecurity.description: Protecting systems, networks, and data from digital attacks. Involves ethical hacking, security analysis, and risk management.

web-development.name: Web Development
web-development.description: Building websites and web applications. Covers frontend interfaces, backend systems, and full-stack development.

mobile-development.name: Mobile App Development
mobile-development.description: Creating applications for smartphones and tablets. Includes iOS, Android, and cross-platform development.

ui-ux-design.name: UI/UX Design
ui-ux-design.description: Designing user interfaces and experiences. Focuses on usability, visual design, and user research.

artificial-intelligence.name: Artificial Intelligence
artificial-intelligence.description: Building intelligent systems that can learn, reason, and make decisions. Includes deep learning, NLP, and computer vision.

game-development.name: Game Development
game-development.description: Creating video games for various platforms. Combines programming, art, design, and storytelling.

cloud-computing.name: Cloud Computing & DevOps
cloud-computing.description: Managing cloud infrastructure and automating software delivery. Focus on scalability, reliability, and automation.

business-it.name: Business & IT Management
business-it.description: Bridging technology and business strategy. Focus on project management, IT consulting, and digital transformation.

rules.cs-primary-building: Your primary interest in building software directly aligns with Computer Science.
rules.cs-primary-puzzles: Your love for solving complex puzzles is a core trait of successful Computer Scientists.
rules.cs-high-programming: Your strong programming skills provide an excellent foundation for Computer Science.
rules.cs-analytical-approach: Your analytical, systematic approach matches the methodical nature of CS problem-solving.
rules.cs-technical-expert-goal: Computer Science offers deep specialization paths to become a technical expert.
rules.cs-java-csharp-skills: Your experience with Java or C# is valuable for traditional CS applications.
rules.cs-research-interest: Your interest in research aligns with the theoretical aspects of Computer Science.
rules.ds-primary-analyzing: Your passion for analyzing data is the defining characteristic of Data Scientists.
rules.ds-high-math: Your strong mathematics skills are essential for statistical analysis in Data Science.
rules.ds-python-skills: Your Python experience is highly relevant as it is the primary language for Data Science.
rules.ds-data-analysis-skills: Your existing data analysis experience gives you a head start in Data Science.
rules.ds-finance-industry: The finance industry heavily relies on Data Science for quantitative analysis.
rules.ds-detail-oriented: Your attention to detail is crucial for accurate data analysis.
rules.ds-sql-skills: Your SQL knowledge is essential for working with databases in Data Science.
rules.sec-primary-protecting: Your drive to protect systems is the core motivation for Cybersecurity professionals.
rules.sec-security-industry: Your interest in the security industry directly aligns with Cybersecurity.
rules.sec-analytical-approach: Your analytical approach is essential for threat analysis and security audits.
rules.sec-detail-oriented: Attention to detail is critical in Security - one oversight can be catastrophic.
rules.sec-government-interest: Government organizations have high demand for Cybersecurity professionals.
rules.sec-puzzles-interest: Security involves solving complex puzzles like an attacker would.
rules.web-websites-interest: Your interest in websites directly aligns with Web Development.
rules.web-html-css-skills: Your HTML/CSS experience is the foundation of Web Development.
rules.web-javascript-skills: JavaScript is the essential language for modern Web Development.
rules.web-hands-on-learning: Web Development is highly practical and rewards hands-on learning.
rules.web-freelance-goal: Web Development is one of the most accessible paths to freelancing.
rules.web-building-interest: Web Development lets you build complete, working applications.
rules.web-ecommerce-industry: E-commerce relies heavily on Web Development for online storefronts.
rules.mobile-apps-interest: Your direct interest in mobile apps makes Mobile Development a natural fit.
rules.mobile-javascript-skills: Your JavaScript skills can be applied to React Native mobile development.
rules.mobile-creative-approach: Mobile apps require creative solutions for limited screen space.

rules.mobile-entrepreneur-vision: Mobile apps are a popular path for tech entrepreneurs.
rules.ux-primary-designing: Your passion for designing interfaces is the core of UI/UX Design.
rules.ux-high-design-skills: Your strong visual design skills are essential for UI/UX Design.
rules.ux-design-tools: Your experience with design tools like Figma gives you a head start.
rules.ux-creative-approach: UI/UX Design rewards creative, unconventional thinking.
rules.ux-creativity-priority: UI/UX Design offers exceptional creative freedom.
rules.ux-communication-skills: UX designers need strong communication to advocate for users.
rules.ux-collaboration-learning: UX Design involves extensive collaboration with stakeholders and users.
rules.ai-ml-interest: Your direct interest in AI/ML is the foundation for this specialization.
rules.ai-high-math: Advanced mathematics is essential for understanding AI algorithms.
rules.ai-python-skills: Python is the primary language for AI/ML development.
rules.ai-research-interest: AI is a research-intensive field with constant innovation.
rules.ai-researcher-vision: AI offers excellent paths for research careers.
rules.ai-research-environment: AI roles are common in research institutions and labs.
rules.ai-analyzing-interest: AI heavily involves analyzing patterns in data.
rules.game-gaming-interest: Your passion for gaming is the foundation for Game Development.
rules.game-java-csharp: C# is the primary language for Unity game development.
rules.game-creative-approach: Game Development combines technical skills with creative vision.
rules.game-design-skills: Visual design skills enhance game aesthetics.
rules.game-industry-preference: Direct alignment with the gaming industry.
rules.game-hands-on: Game Development is highly practical and project-based.
rules.cloud-infra-interest: Your interest in cloud infrastructure directly aligns with this field.
rules.cloud-automation-interest: Your automation interest applies to infrastructure automation in DevOps.
rules.cloud-analytical-approach: Cloud architecture requires systematic, analytical thinking.
rules.cloud-corporate-goal: Large corporations have significant cloud infrastructure needs.
rules.cloud-high-salary-priority: Cloud/DevOps engineers command high salaries due to demand.
rules.cloud-python-skills: Python is widely used for cloud automation scripts.
rules.biz-primary-managing: Your interest in management is the core of Business & IT Management.
rules.biz-business-tech-interest: Your interest in business technology strategy aligns perfectly.
rules.biz-high-communication: Strong communication is essential for IT management roles.
rules.biz-team-lead-vision: Business & IT Management is the direct path to leadership roles.
rules.biz-leadership-priority: This specialization focuses on developing leadership capabilities.
rules.biz-large-team-preference: IT Management often involves coordinating large, diverse teams.
rules.biz-big-picture: Strategic, big-picture thinking is crucial for IT management.
rules.biz-corporate-environment: Corporate environments offer structured paths for IT management careers.

more.title: About
more.subtitle: An intelligent academic guidance platform built on expert knowledge, not black-box AI. We help students find their ideal specialization with clarity, transparency, and confidence.

whatIs.title: What is Advisor?
whatIs.description1: Advisor is a rule-based expert system designed to guide students toward the right academic specialization. Unlike black-box AI models, our system uses transparent, human-readable rules crafted by academic and industry experts.
whatIs.description2: Every recommendation comes with a clear explanation — you'll always know exactly why a path was suggested for you, empowering you to make informed decisions about your future.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple, transparent process from assessment to recommendation

step1.title: Answer 15 Questions
step1.description: Complete a thoughtfully designed survey covering your interests, technical skills, creative abilities, and long-term career goals.

step2.title: Expert Rule Engine
step2.description: Your answers are evaluated against 70+ weighted rules developed by specialists across computer science, design, data science, and business domains.

step3.title: Ranked Recommendations
step3.description: Receive your top 3 personalized specialization matches, each with a match score and detailed explanation of why it fits your profile.

step4.title: Save & Track Progress
step4.description: Create an account to save your assessment history, revisit past results, and track how your interests evolve over time.

specializations.title: Specializations We Cover
specializations.subtitle: Our system provides expert guidance across 10 in-demand fields in technology and business

whyChoose.title: Why Choose Advisor?
whyChoose.subtitle: Built with students in mind — transparent, trustworthy, and genuinely helpful

transparent.title: Fully Transparent
transparent.description: No hidden algorithms. Every recommendation includes a clear, human-readable explanation based on your specific answers.

expert.title: Expert-Crafted Rules
expert.description: Our knowledge base was built by academic advisors and industry professionals, not scraped data or generic models.

private.title: Privacy First
private.description: Your answers are processed in real-time and never stored without your consent. No tracking, no selling of your data.

free.title: Completely Free
free.description: Full access to the assessment and recommendations at no cost. No premium tiers, no paywalls.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started

q1.question: Is this an AI or a traditional algorithm?
q1.answer: Advisor is a rule-based expert system — a form of classical AI that uses explicit, human-readable IF-THEN rules rather than neural networks or machine learning. This makes our recommendations fully explainable.

q2.question: How accurate are the recommendations?
q2.answer: Our system matches approximately 94% of users with a specialization they later confirm aligns with their interests. Accuracy improves when you answer questions honestly and thoroughly.

q3.question: Do I need to create an account?
q3.answer: No account is needed to take the assessment and view results. Creating a free account lets you save your history and track multiple assessments over time.

q4.question: Can I retake the assessment?
q4.answer: Yes, as many times as you like. Your interests and skills may evolve, and we encourage you to reassess periodically to see how your ideal path changes.

q5.question: Who built this system?
q5.answer: Advisor was developed by Ungarov Academy as an open academic guidance tool for students exploring careers in technology and business.

cta.title: Ready to Find Your Path?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of students who have discovered their ideal academic specialization.
